They correctly state that the code is a standard autogenerated wrapper with no malicious logic.\n\n---\n\n### Final Synthesis:\n\n- **Overall Malware Score:** **0** — no malicious behavior detected.  \n- **Obfuscated Score:** **0** — code is clear, autogenerated, with no obfuscation.  \n- **Risk Score:** **0.1** — minimal risk, primarily related to the trustworthiness of the contract address and underlying contract, not the code itself.\n\n### Conclusion:\n\nThe code is a typical, safe, autogenerated smart contract interface factory.
